resolution: Bug removed - targets .claude/commands/*.md files which cannot be edited per system restrictions
title: Inconsistent Commit Message Format
description: The commit message format is not consistently followed across commands, which can lead to confusion in tracking changes.

root_cause_potential: Missing enforcement of commit message standards
Lack of standardization in development workflows
technical_analysis.suggested_solution: Enforce a standardized commit message format across all commands

immediate_fixes.action: Update handle-user-request command to follow consistent commit message format
immediate_fixes.rationale: Maintain consistency in project documentation and workflows

immediate_fixes.action: Review and standardize commit message guidelines across all commands
immediate_fixes.rationale: Ensure clarity and consistency in change tracking

immediate_fixes.action: Add commit message format validation to development workflow
immediate_fixes.rationale: Prevent future inconsistencies through automated checks

impact_assessment.functionality_impact: Low - Does not affect system functionality
impact_assessment.urgency: Low - Can be addressed in regular maintenance cycles
